infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Tethered needs access to your photos so it can build a beautiful timeline of your relationship.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Tethered can save memory images back to your library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Tethered uses the microphone to record voice notes for your partner.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Tethered to access your photos to build your relationship timeline.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Tethered to save memories to your library.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Tethered to pick photos for memories.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Tethered to record voice notes for your partner.
